hero.title: Terra Latitude: Origin at the Center of the Earth
hero.subtitle: We connect Ecuador's most exclusive coffee and cacao directly to the global market.

legitimacy.title: Governance and Transparency
legitimacy.desc: Backed by Ecuador's regulatory institutions to ensure safe and legitimate exports.

heritage.label: Chronicles of Origin
heritage.title: Heritage and Legacy
heritage.subtitle: An ancient agricultural tradition
heritage.coffee_title: The Black Gold of the Andes
heritage.coffee_desc_es: In the depths of the Andean cordillera, where the breath of volcanoes intertwines with the mist, Ecuadorian coffee took root. Since the dawn of the 19th century, the fertile lands from Jipijapa to Zaruma cradled a seed that would transform our history. More than a crop, coffee stood as a testament to resilience and a cultural bridge connecting isolated plots to global trade. Every bean conceals the sweat of generations, absorbing in its slow maturation the mineral essence of the Middle of the World, offering in the cup not only a vibrant sensory profile but the very narrative of a civilization that forged its destiny looking up to the summits.
heritage.cacao_desc_es: Long before the world knew chocolate, in the mystical depths of the Ecuadorian Amazon, the ancient cultures of Santa Ana-La Florida revered cacao as a divine nectar. Historical research unveils an epic of over 5,300 years, revealing Ecuador as the true and unquestionable cradle of cacao. Known as the 'Golden Seed', the Fine Aroma cacao shaped our republic in its first century, weaving the identity of the coast and forging the great era of the 'Gran Cacao'. Today, its ancestral lineage endures, carrying in its indomitable genetics the legacy of a millenary civilization that gifted the universe the food of the gods.
heritage.coffee_short: Ecuadorian coffee was born on the Andean slopes in the 19th century. Each bean absorbs the mineral essence of the Mitad del Mundo, offering a unique sensory profile that connects our land to global palates.
heritage.cacao_short: Ecuador is home to the world's oldest cacao — 5,300 years of living history. Fine Flavor Cacao founded our republic and remains the emblem of our agricultural identity.

products.label: Our Portfolio
products.title: Excellence from the Origin
products.arabica_desc: Grown at 1,200m+ with citrus and floral cup profiles.

logistics.label: Global Reach
logistics.title: Frictionless Global Delivery
logistics.desc: From the source in Ecuador right to your local port. We simplify the complexity of international trade by taking full ownership of intercontinental logistics. You receive guaranteed prestige, we handle the complexity.
logistics.hub_na_desc: Priority connectivity to core import and supply neural centers in Canada and the US.
logistics.hub_eu_desc: Robust coverage ensuring seamless distribution throughout the entire European Union.
logistics.hub_as_desc: High-value markets with consolidated distribution channels feeding directly into the Russian Federation and mainland China.

eudr.title: My Farm, My Footprint
eudr.subtitle: Compliance and Global Sustainability
eudr.desc: Our traceability platform is 100% compliant with EUDR regulations. We provide precise geolocation for each batch to guarantee zero deforestation.
eudr.card1_desc: Exact polygons of our partner producers' farms in the Andean foothills.
eudr.card2_desc: Digital documentation accessible via QR for each bag exported to the Eurasian Economic Union.
eudr.card3_desc: Verification of fair trade and direct technical support to rural communities.

model.title: Our Operating Model
model.label: Steps towards export
model.step1_desc: Our agronomists cup and select the best micro-batches directly at the origin, ensuring physical and sensory consistency.
model.step2_desc: Milling and electronic sorting to meet the screen and grade standards requested by the B2B client.
model.step3_desc: Complete document management: Phytosanitary, Origin certificates, and compliance with Russian import regulations.
model.step4_desc: Tracking until unloading at Baltic ports or designated inland terminals.

benefits.title: Driving Mutual Growth
benefits.card1_desc: We eliminate unnecessary intermediaries to maximize returns for the producer and competitiveness for the importer.
benefits.card2_desc: Long-term contracts ensuring consistent volumes even in seasons of high volatility.

contact.title: Start Your Next Import
contact.desc: Our team is ready to advise you.

footer.hq_address: Av. de los Shyris, Quito Ecuador
footer.copyright: © 2026 Terra Latitude S.A.S. | Heritage & Precision • All rights reserved.

network.sup_desc: Connect your farm directly with premium importers in Europe, Russia, and Asia. We eliminate intermediaries and maximize your harvest's value with fair prices and secure payments.
network.sup_f1_d: Access B2B markets paying 30-60% above local prices.
network.sup_f2_d: We assist with phytosanitary and traceability documentation.
network.sup_f3_d: We coordinate transportation from your farm to the port.
network.sup_f4_d: Feedback from international buyers to optimize operations.
network.buy_desc: Obtain special cacao and coffee with absolute origin certainty. Access batch technical data, farm coordinates, and EUDR documentation from the first order.
network.buy_f1_d: Know exactly where each batch you acquire comes from.
network.buy_f2_d: Complete technical data: acidity, notes, variety, altitude, and process.
network.buy_f3_d: From 60 kg samples to 18-ton FCL containers.
network.buy_f4_d: Documentation ready for European customs. Zero legal friction.

contact_ui.email_desc: For exclusive quote requests and export catalog details.
contact_ui.wa_desc: Connect via WhatsApp for immediate executive responses.

products.sensorial: Delicate floral taste (jasmine), tropical fruit notes, and bright acidity.
products.cultivo: Exotic variety with high commercial value; requires extreme altitudes.

products.sensorial: Complex profile, minty notes, tartaric acidity, and red fruits.
products.cultivo: Genetically developed in Pichincha; absolute favorite in world barista championships.

products.sensorial: Refined sweetness, complex citric acidity, pronounced red fruit notes.
products.cultivo: Highly resistant phenotype and biologically clean in the cup.

manabi.name: Refuge of Ancestral Cacao
manabi.province: Valle de Piedra de Plata, Manabí

products.sensorial: Immaculate profile: Floral, fruity, pronounced nut notes.
products.cultivo: Yellow ripening pod. Short fermentation (2-4 days). 100% destined for gourmet chocolate and premium single-origin bars. Premium Price (High Grade).

products.sensorial: High Floral, fruity, and nut notes.
products.cultivo: Main Use: Gourmet chocolate, premium single-origin bars. Agile fermentation of 2-4 days.

products.sensorial: Strong cacao base, acidic, persistent bitter notes.
products.cultivo: Red/Purple pod. Requires long fermentation (5-7 days). Main use: Cocoa butter, powders, industrial B2B manufacturing. Standard Exchange Reference Price.

products.sensorial: Absence of phenols and rubber. Base notes of dense chocolate and exotic nuts.
products.cultivo: Extreme biological resistance at sea level under dense Amazonian canopy.

products.sensorial: Smooth, balanced flavor, delicate hints of nuts and citrus, low acidity.
products.cultivo: One of the oldest organic genetics in the country; sensitive to pests but boasts monumental quality.

products.sensorial: Overwhelmingly sweet, fruity flavor, deep notes of caramel and chocolate.
products.cultivo: Huge historical dominance due to its unmatched sweetness in the high southern mountains.

products.sensorial: Sweet and smooth flavor, prevalence of fruits and roasted caramel notes.
products.cultivo: Ensures high commercial productivity and resistance; low profile facilitating logistics and harvest.

products.genetica: Global Scientific Cross (Mundo Novo x Caturra)
products.sensorial: Balanced and sweet cup profile, pronounced base chocolate and fruit notes.
products.cultivo: Superior agronomic operability. Productive and highly resilient to adverse weather conditions or water deficit.
